params.label: Population
params.tip: The population to detect aggregates of (e.g. T cells). Spatially-proximal groups of these cells become aggregates; the rest are non-aggregated.

params.label: Neighbourhood (µm)
params.tip: DBSCAN eps in microns — cells within this distance are linked into the same aggregate.

params.label: Min cells
params.tip: Minimum number of cells for a group to count as an aggregate (DBSCAN minPts).

params.label: Per timepoint
params.tip: Live imaging: detect aggregates independently at each timepoint (aggregate IDs stay unique across time). Off = pool all timepoints.
